title: 9 Herbal Tinctures for Teachers to Overcome Chickenpox
description: Echinacea angustifolia tinctures are often used to help alleviate symptoms of chickenpox. This herb contains properties like alkylamides, caffeic acid derivatives, and polysaccharides, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The constituents, specifically the alkylamides, are believed to boost the immune system and help the body fight off the virus that causes chickenpox.
